chunks.title: Enumerate Function in Python
chunks.text: Sometimes when we do for loop, we need an index.

chunks.title: Enumerate Function in Python
chunks.text: Let's say I'm iterating a list and I need a variable there

chunks.title: Enumerate Function in Python
chunks.text: which tells me which element is there, which index of the list is running.

chunks.title: Enumerate Function in Python
chunks.text: I told you earlier that we can make a temporary variable,

chunks.title: Enumerate Function in Python
chunks.text: increment it and use it.

chunks.title: Enumerate Function in Python
chunks.text: But today I will tell you about the enumerate function

chunks.title: Enumerate Function in Python
chunks.text: which will make this task very easy.

chunks.title: Enumerate Function in Python
chunks.text: Let's go to the computer screen and let's get started.

chunks.title: Enumerate Function in Python
chunks.text: Today we will see the enumerate function,

chunks.title: Enumerate Function in Python
chunks.text: a function which will save you a lot of time.

chunks.text: How does it work?

chunks.title: Enumerate Function in Python
chunks.text: It's very simple.

chunks.title: Enumerate Function in Python
chunks.text: Let's say I tell you that I need to iterate all the elements of a list

chunks.title: Enumerate Function in Python

chunks.text: You know how the rest of the children are.

chunks.text: So someone got 1 mark and this is marks.

chunks.text: Okay, I will put a comma.

chunks.title: Enumerate Function in Python

chunks.title: Enumerate Function in Python
chunks.text: I know I am wasting time.

chunks.title: Enumerate Function in Python

chunks.title: Enumerate Function in Python

chunks.title: Enumerate Function in Python
chunks.text: Okay, so this is linter.

chunks.title: Enumerate Function in Python

chunks.title: Enumerate Function in Python

chunks.title: Enumerate Function in Python

chunks.title: Enumerate Function in Python

chunks.title: Enumerate Function in Python
chunks.text: Enumerate function is a built-in function in Python

chunks.title: Enumerate Function in Python
chunks.text: that allows you to loop over a sequence.
